title: Vanilla Enhanced
description: Slightly modded, while keeping the vanilla experience
body:
![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fd70ff6af35a1adf8285028c91a3337462379f8d.jpeg)

I'll be updating as much as possible, when more mods get added.

My aim is to make minecraft a more enjoyable experience while keeping it as close to vanilla as possible.

This modpack includes things such as...

> Farming,
> Higher Enchantment levels,
> Backpacks,
> Structures and Dungeons,
> Ability to pick up all mobs including villages,
> Better villages,
> Daily Quests and more ways to get xp,

and much more!

Any issues with the modpack (not individual mods) message me on discord - Sophcorrected
